2314930.name: Far Tale
2314930.description:
Narrative role-playing game in the world of Slavic dark fantasy.
You have to take on the role of a father who must guide his daughter to distant lands. A cruel world, terrible monsters, witchcraft, and even time itself will stand in your way.

Game features

A large global map, where along the way you will have many points of interest, random events and story arcs.
When traveling, you need to remember the time and replenish supplies in time.
A non-linear story with choices that have consequences. Some chapters may be completely different, depending on your choice. Decisions and their consequences should be considered. The hero's companions may not live to see the finale
Turn-based combat system for fans of tactical battles. Many types of opponents with their own characteristics. Pumping characters through equipment and various points of interest.

World

The game world is set in a Slavic dark fantasy setting.
Many realms lie in ruins, consumed many years ago by the curse of a blood plague that turns people into terrible monsters called ghouls or bloodspawn.
In addition, the Long Night is coming - a time when the sun does not illuminate the earth for a long time, and therefore, evil creatures raise their heads and besiege entire settlements. Even the Gods are not able to resist them, because monsters are able to resist magical effects, and therefore, in such difficult days, you have to rely only on yourself and your loved ones.
In the course of the journey, you will have to go along the tract - a long road stretching almost across the entire continent. And on the way you will meet various settlements, forests, fields, mountains, swamps, rivers, and much more.

Game features and mechanics

  • The player travels around the global map choosing destinations or points of interest.
  • In the course of movement, plot or random events, monster attacks can occur.
  • The ability to complete some tasks depends on the time of day.
  • The choice in the dialogues can lead to different consequences, both good and bad.
  • In the game, you can meet 5 characters available for invitation to the squad. The characters have their own quest chains, conflict points and dialogues. They will comment on your actions and may die as a result of your decisions or lay down their lives in battle.
  • The player must keep an eye on supplies and fatigue, otherwise the squad will not be able to effectively fight, restore health and use abilities.
  • The player is limited by the time frame - the daughter is terminally ill. Delays along the way lead to negative effects, including bad endings.
  • The player can upgrade the hero's abilities, change them as a result of story or side quests, as well as upgrade his weapons and armor.
